description: An agent must check a draft proposal to ensure all mandatory sections from the company's standard template are included.

nodes.task_description: Load the list of mandatory sections from the standard template (e.g., 'Scope', 'Deliverables', 'Fees', 'Assumptions').

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly retrieves the list of required sections.

nodes.task_description: Scan the draft proposal to see which of the mandatory sections are present.
Generate a report listing any missing sections.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report stating that the 'Assumptions' section is missing from the draft.
